claim: Send lunch broadcasts between 11:30 AM and 12:30 PM to leverage the pre-lunch decision window with highest open rates
why_it_works: Time scarcity drives habitual decision-making; WhatsApp's high open rate beats all other channels
dont: Never send before 9 AM or after 9 PM
Avoid promotional broadcasts without opt-in

claim: Use Instagram Reels to drive discovery and increase weekend footfall, with a potential uplift of 30%
why_it_works: Short-form video content resonates with younger audiences, increasing engagement and driving footfall
dont: Don't overpost, risking audience fatigue
Avoid low-quality or irrelevant content

claim: Invest in sponsored/featured placement on Zomato/Swiggy to increase orders and discovery, with a potential uplift of 25-60% during peaks
why_it_works: High visibility on food delivery platforms drives user choices, increasing orders and revenue
dont: Don't neglect high-quality food images and accurate menu information
Avoid poor customer reviews and low ratings

claim: Use email marketing for loyalty programs, offering exclusive deals and promotions to increase engagement and retention
why_it_works: Personalized email content can foster loyalty and drive repeat visits, especially among couples seeking exclusive experiences
dont: Don't send generic or spammy emails, risking audience fatigue
Avoid neglecting email list segmentation and personalization

claim: Invest in targeted Google Ads to reach high-end customers, increasing brand visibility and driving conversions
why_it_works: Targeted online advertising can effectively reach affluent audiences, driving conversions and revenue
dont: Don't neglect ad copy quality and relevance
Avoid poor landing page experiences and low-quality website design

claim: Use Instagram for discovery and setting expectations, as younger cohorts (18-35) discover via Instagram and respond well to FOMO and influencer cues
why_it_works: Younger cohorts are active on Instagram and respond well to visual content and influencer cues
dont: Don't use Instagram for direct offers or confirmations, as WhatsApp is more effective for these purposes

claim: Prioritize WhatsApp for retention and habit formation, implementing weekly or biweekly targeted broadcasts, transactional confirmations, and loyalty nudges
why_it_works: WhatsApp has high open rates and vendor reports of strong ROI, making it effective for retention and habit formation
dont: Don't send promotional broadcasts without opt-in, and avoid sending messages before 9 AM or after 9 PM

claim: Use influencer/VIP positioning to generate high demand in metros, as this can create a sense of exclusivity and prestige
why_it_works: Influencer/VIP positioning can create a sense of exclusivity and prestige, appealing to premium customers
dont: Don't overuse influencer/VIP positioning, as this can come across as insincere or try-hard

claim: Combine Zomato/Site optimization + social proof, investing in maintaining high ratings and sponsored slots during peak hours
why_it_works: High ratings and sponsored slots on Zomato/Swiggy can increase discovery and conversions, especially for families looking for reliable options
dont: Don't neglect to maintain high ratings, as this can negatively impact discovery and conversions

claim: Send lunch broadcasts between 11:30 AM and 12:30 PM to office workers, as this is the pre-lunch decision window with the highest open rates
why_it_works: Time scarcity drives habitual decision-making, and WhatsApp's 98% open rate beats all other channels
dont: Never send before 9 AM or after 9 PM
Avoid promotional broadcasts without opt-in

claim: Run Instagram ads targeting college kids during peak hours (12 PM - 4 PM) to increase brand awareness and drive sales
why_it_works: College kids are active on Instagram during peak hours, and targeted ads can increase brand recall and drive conversions
dont: Don't use overly promotional language
Avoid targeting kids under 18 years old

claim: Send exclusive offers and discounts to couples via email to increase loyalty and retention
why_it_works: Couples appreciate personalized offers and are more likely to return to a restaurant that shows they care
dont: Don't spam or send too many emails
Avoid generic or non-personalized content

claim: Optimize your Zomato and Swiggy listings to attract families by highlighting kid-friendly options and family packs
why_it_works: Families actively search for kid-friendly options on food delivery platforms, and optimized listings can increase visibility and sales
dont: Don't neglect to update your menu and pricing regularly
Avoid low-quality food images or inaccurate descriptions

claim: Run targeted Google Ads to attract premium customers by highlighting luxury offerings and exclusive experiences
why_it_works: Premium customers actively search for high-end experiences online, and targeted Google Ads can increase brand visibility and drive conversions
dont: Don't use generic or non-targeted ad copy
Avoid bidding on irrelevant keywords
